response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of software development experience but almost none of it in C++. The only C/C++ role was a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015. The rest of the career is centered on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, with no demonstrated experience in industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, message brokers in a C++ context, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850). The technical core of the role is a poor match.
strengths: Long tenure (~14 years) with senior/staff-level full-stack experience
Some low-latency, multi-threaded, high-throughput backend exposure (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, over a decade ago
No evidence of IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or industrial cybersecurity background
No industrial automation, IoT, or industrial-protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial automation and IEC 62443 / SDL expertise
Senior-level engineering maturity and distributed systems exposure
